TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tada kamu nu Mancu u Mancu a kamuÔľŹmanyi , nu Ae-tayyi-si nantun kuse-yicu. yu cincaw zitay naw layak ku kamu, singanganaca tu " cinyi". Tatengaay nu nakamuan nu manyi pangangan hantu " kuyhun-yi", tapang nu nakamuan u caaya henay picumu a cincuo a ngalnganlan, Cenlun mihcaan namaka cinkawcun a nisiluda, sisa si nganganaca tu " cindin-sin-cenyi". ". Cencaw a zitayan, makaadih ku Mancu-zen tu Hunti' pabeli tu lili, cuose, sapatubeli nu cancanan a kawawan nu sasiludan. anu cuose-ce idaw kuniladayan nida tu caaya kalucek nu nakamuan a kaynah nu Hunti. kunlin-kung atu tangce misalisin satu u sapabeli tu tuas a nakamuan awkamutu nu nisiludan tu kamu nu samanyi. tinisatu, mamcuzen nu caaya kalecad a aaenengan caay namim kalecad ku nakamuan, mahida u pai-cen "p", sencen "q", nengkuta, alacuke' nu nakamuan. .
S.PHON: tada kamu nu man ¶u u man ¶u a kamu*manji , nu a…ô-tajji-si nantun kus…ô-ji ¶u. ju ¶in ¶aw zitaj naw r~…ĺajak ku kamu, siŇčaŇčana ¶a tu " ¶inji". tat…ôŇčaaj nu nakamuan nu manji paŇčaŇčan ńßantu " kujńßun-ji", tapaŇč nu nakamuan u ¶aaja ńß…ônaj pi ¶umu a ¶in ¶uo a Ňčar~…ĺŇčanr~…ĺan, ¶…ônr~…ĺun mińß ¶aan namaka ¶inkaw ¶un a nisir~…ĺuda, sisa si ŇčaŇčana ¶a tu " ¶indin-sin- ¶…ônji". ". ¶…ôn ¶aw a zitajan, makaadińß ku man ¶u-z…ôn tu ńßunti Ē~ ° pab…ôr~…ĺi tu r~…ĺir~…ĺi, ¶uos…ô, sapatub…ôr~…ĺi nu ¶an ¶anan a kawawan nu sasir~…ĺudan. anu ¶uos…ô- ¶…ô idaw kunir~…ĺadajan nida tu ¶aaja kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk nu nakamuan a kajnańß nu ńßunti. kunr~…ĺin-kuŇč atu taŇč ¶…ô misar~…ĺisin satu u sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu tuas a nakamuan awkamutu nu nisir~…ĺudan tu kamu nu samanji. tinisatu, mam ¶uz…ôn nu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a aa…ôn…ôŇčan ¶aaj namim kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nakamuan, mańßida u pai- ¶…ôn "p", s…ôn ¶…ôn "*", n…ôŇčkuta, ar~…ĺa ¶uk…ô Ē~ ° nu nakamuan. .
S.FORM: tada kamu nu Mancu u Mancu a kamuÔľŹmanyi , nu Ae-tayyi-si nantun kuse-yicu. yu cincaw zitay naw layak ku kamu, singanganaca tu " cinyi". Tatengaay nu nakamuan nu manyi pangangan hantu " kuyhun-yi", tapang nu nakamuan u caaya henay picumu a cincuo a ngalnganlan, Cenlun mihcaan namaka cinkawcun a nisiluda, sisa si nganganaca tu " cindin-sin-cenyi". ". Cencaw a zitayan, makaadih ku Mancu-zen tu Hunti' pabeli tu lili, cuose, sapatubeli nu cancanan a kawawan nu sasiludan. anu cuose-ce idaw kuniladayan nida tu caaya kalucek nu nakamuan a kaynah nu Hunti. kunlin-kung atu tangce misalisin satu u sapabeli tu tuas a nakamuan awkamutu nu nisiludan tu kamu nu samanyi. tinisatu, mamcuzen nu caaya kalecad a aaenengan caay namim kalecad ku nakamuan, mahida u pai-cen "p", sencen "q", nengkuta, alacuke' nu nakamuan. .
S.PHON: tada kamu nu man ¶u u man ¶u a kamu*manji , nu a…ô-tajji-si nantun kus…ô-ji ¶u. ju ¶in ¶aw zitaj naw r~…ĺajak ku kamu, siŇčaŇčana ¶a tu " ¶inji". tat…ôŇčaaj nu nakamuan nu manji paŇčaŇčan ńßantu " kujńßun-ji", tapaŇč nu nakamuan u ¶aaja ńß…ônaj pi ¶umu a ¶in ¶uo a Ňčar~…ĺŇčanr~…ĺan, ¶…ônr~…ĺun mińß ¶aan namaka ¶inkaw ¶un a nisir~…ĺuda, sisa si ŇčaŇčana ¶a tu " ¶indin-sin- ¶…ônji". ". ¶…ôn ¶aw a zitajan, makaadińß ku man ¶u-z…ôn tu ńßunti Ē~ ° pab…ôr~…ĺi tu r~…ĺir~…ĺi, ¶uos…ô, sapatub…ôr~…ĺi nu ¶an ¶anan a kawawan nu sasir~…ĺudan. anu ¶uos…ô- ¶…ô idaw kunir~…ĺadajan nida tu ¶aaja kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk nu nakamuan a kajnańß nu ńßunti. kunr~…ĺin-kuŇč atu taŇč ¶…ô misar~…ĺisin satu u sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu tuas a nakamuan awkamutu nu nisir~…ĺudan tu kamu nu samanji. tinisatu, mam ¶uz…ôn nu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a aa…ôn…ôŇčan ¶aaj namim kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nakamuan, mańßida u pai- ¶…ôn "p", s…ôn ¶…ôn "*", n…ôŇčkuta, ar~…ĺa ¶uk…ô Ē~ ° nu nakamuan. .
